initial_solo.subject: Training Plan Outreach: {name}
initial_solo.body:
Hi {firstname},

I'm working on your 1-1 plan, what would you like to focus on?

worksheet_link_solo.subject: Training Plan: {name}
worksheet_link_solo.body:
Hey {firstname},

I have updated your training plan for the weekend.

Link here: {folder_link}

Please let me know if you have any questions, otherwise I'll see you there!

follow_up_workshop.subject: Following up - {name}
follow_up_workshop.body:
Hi {firstname},

Great flying with you at the workshop! Check out the schedule here: https://rhythmskydiving.com/schedule/

initial_group.subject: Training Plan Outreach: {groupname}
initial_group.body:
Hey all,

I'm working on the plan for this weekend. Please let me know which specific slot(s) each of you would like to fly so I can tailor the dives appropriately!

worksheet_link_group.subject: Training Plan: {groupname}
worksheet_link_group.body:
Hey all,

I have updated the training plan with jumps.

Link here: {folder_link}

Please let me know if you have any questions, otherwise I'll see you there!

follow_up_workshop.body:
Hi {groupname},
